reference: Five days ago, I slipped on a tile floor and landed hard on my back. It knocked the wind out of me. I also hit my head. I had my back X-rayed and there was no new injury. The stiffness is improving, but now I have sharp pain in my chest on the right side, front if I stand or sit for long. If I lie on my back, I feel fine. Any ideas?
text: Five days ago, I slipped on the tile floor and landed hard on my back. It knocked the wind out of me. I also hit my head. I had my back exhaled and there was no knee injury. The sickness has been bleeding, but now I have sharp pain in my chest on the right side. Clunk if I stand or sit for a while. If I lie on my back, I feel fine. Any idea?
